_comment: FAIL — contains_tree_nuts is true but tree_nut_types is missing. UK food law requires the specific nut to be named (e.g. 'almonds'), not just 'tree nuts'. The required_if rule fires and blocks the record.
ingredients_text: Wheat flour, butter (milk), almonds, sugar, eggs, yeast, salt.
_missing: tree_nut_types is absent — required_if fires because contains_tree_nuts = true. The specific nut (almonds) must be declared.
